name: malformed_schema_echo_source_01
description: Anonymized production-shaped email that previously produced schema-echo / empty JSON from a model. Used for protocol-fallback regression, not semantic quality.

provenance.anonymization_notes: Sender, org, and links replaced. Dense HTML-like layout and promotional structure preserved to stress structured-output parsing.

input.subject: Your weekly product digest from Northwind Tools
input.snippet: Top stories this week from Northwind Tools...
input.body_text:
Northwind Tools — Weekly Digest

Hi there,

Here are this week's highlights. No meetings are scheduled in this message.

  • Feature spotlight: Export templates now support nested sections.
  • Tip: Pin your favorite workspaces from Settings → Preferences.
  • Community: Read the June customer story on our blog.
Promo code SAVE10 expires eventually — no calendar date given.
Read more

If the JSON schema for events were echoed here by mistake, it would look like:

{"type":"object","properties":{"events_found":{"type":"boolean"},"events":{"type":"array"}}}

This email itself contains no calendar events.

— The Northwind Tools Team

notes: Hand-written expected: no events. Primary goal is ensuring malformed/schema-echo responses route to fallback without false-success logging.
